For You

排骨蛋炒饭 Fried Rice with Pork Chop & Eggs

Voted & awarded Singapore's Best Fried Rice, this dish boasts of a succulent pork chop atop Din Tai Fung's signature Fried Rice with Eggs

17.44

小笼包 Steamed Pork Xiao Long Bao (10pcs)

Steamed Pork Xiao Long Bao traditionally contain minced pork wrapped in a delicate dough skin, which is then pleated, twisted at the top and steamed. Din Tai Fung’s rendition consists of juicy meat filling wrapped in a silky smooth skin with a minimum of 18 exquisite folds.

16.35

虾仁蛋炒饭 Fried Rice with Shrimps & Eggs
